calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Loudoun County Public Schools in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Loudoun County Public Schools is Tuesday, September 2, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for Loudoun County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Loudoun County Public Schools runs Apr 6, 2026–Apr 10, 2026, 5 days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2025-2026 for Loudoun County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Loudoun County Public Schools runs Dec 22, 2025–Jan 2, 2026, 12 days. School resumes Jan 5, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Latest Start in Northern VA
yearNumbers.detail: Loudoun County begins September 2, 2025 — after Labor Day and later than Fairfax, Prince William, and Chesterfield counties, which start in late August. Families moving from neighboring districts should plan for the different timing.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break Apr 6–10
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break falls April 6–10, 2026 — one to two weeks later than most Northern Virginia neighbors. The later window typically means lower travel prices and more availability at popular spring break destinations.

yearNumbers.label: Columbus Day Holiday
yearNumbers.detail: Loudoun County observes Columbus Day as a school holiday on October 13 — not all Virginia or Maryland districts do. Families with children in different Northern Virginia districts should verify whether Columbus Day is off for all their kids.

calendarNotes: Loudoun County Public Schools begins the 2025–2026 school year on September 2, 2025. Spring Break runs April 6–10, 2026. The school year ends June 18, 2026.
